overall.description: Stationary elevated view from a balcony overlooking a futuristic cyberpunk city intersection with continuous traffic flow, towering glass buildings with neon signage, and palm trees. Game engine footage depicting a bustling urban environment with ground vehicles and occasional flying cars against an overcast sky.

segments.scene_description: A stationary view from an elevated glass balcony overlooking a futuristic cyberpunk city intersection. The distinctive US tower rises in the center background while a neon-lit building complex dominates the right side. Traffic flows continuously along the multi-lane road below, with various futuristic vehicles navigating the curves and occasional flying cars passing overhead. Palm trees line the left side of the street, and sparse pedestrians walk along the sidewalks in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary elevated perspective overlooking a bustling cyberpunk intersection that emphasizes the scale of a futuristic urban center. It begins from a glass balcony, capturing the continuous flow of multi-lane traffic and the occasional glide of flying cars overhead. As the eye moves across the horizon, the view centers on the towering US tower rising in the background, framed by a neon-lit building complex that dominates the right side of the frame. The scene then expands to include the organic contrast of palm trees lining the left side of the street, while sparse pedestrians navigate the distant sidewalks under an overcast sky.
